recommendations.title: Monster Island
recommendations.overview: In the Pacific, 1944, a Japanese soldier and a British prisoner of war are stranded on a deserted island, hunted by a deadly creature. Two mortal enemies must come together to survive the unknown.

recommendations.title: From the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple on a trip through the Irish countryside find themselves hunted by a creature who only attacks at night.

recommendations.title: The Crucible
recommendations.overview: A Salem resident attempts to frame her ex-lover's wife for being a witch in the middle of the 1692 witchcraft trials.

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: The Pyramid
recommendations.overview: An archaeological team attempt to unlock the secrets of a lost pyramid only to find themselves hunted by an insidious creature.

recommendations.title: Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2
recommendations.overview: A group of college students decide to take part in a witch hunt tour inspired by a horror movie. As the adventure goes awry, the students realise that an evil being has followed them home.

recommendations.title: Antebellum
recommendations.overview: Successful author Veronica finds herself trapped in a horrifying reality and must uncover the mind-bending mystery before it's too late.

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn
recommendations.overview: Chris crashes into a carload of other young people, and the group of stranded motorists is soon lost in the woods of West Virginia, where they're hunted by three cannibalistic mountain men who are grossly disfigured by generations of inbreeding.

recommendations.title: Weapons
recommendations.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.
